behavior_summary: Implements an egg-hatching sequence for an item passed as the function parameter. The sequence starts a camera quake and plays a U8P_STMEGG::hatch sound, scans a nearby map/item array for entries matching a masked value derived from the egg, spawns a helper script for each match (creating hatchlings), runs a single follow-up/cleanup helper, stops the camera quake, and destroys the egg item.

Matching logic: for each scanned map entry the script compares Item::getQ(entry) to (Item::getMapArray(egg) & 0x1F). Every match triggers spawning of STMITE::00AE with the pid and the matched entry pointer/index.

Spawning semantics: each per-match spawn is implied/suspended on (the script waits for some return/implication), then after the loop the script spawns FREE::1C19 once (args pid, 0x0096, 0) and similarly suspends on it before finishing.
notable_control_flow: Entry via an Event 7 fast-area/trigger handler starts an effect block (quake + SFX).
Iterative loop over a map/list: call Item::getQ on each entry, compare to (Item::getMapArray(egg) & 0x1F).
On a match: spawn U8P_STMITE::00AE (per-match helper) with (pid, matched_entry), then suspend/imply on the spawn's return before continuing the loop.
After finishing the scan loop: spawn U8P_FREE::1C19 once with (pid, 0x0096, 0) and suspend on its return.
Terminate effects (Camera::stopQuake) and remove the egg by calling Item::destroy(item).
open_questions: What semantic meaning is encoded in the low 5 bits of Item::getMapArray(egg)? (species/type lookup vs. variant index)
What exact behavior do U8P_STMITE::00AE and U8P_FREE::1C19 perform (spawned actor type, initial placement, lifetime, and the meaning of argument 0x0096)?
Who provides the pid argument and whether it is the player, the egg's owner, or a process id associated with the egg (caller context is inferred but not explicit)?
Does Event 7 fire only on area-entry (enterFastArea) or can it be triggered programmatically (i.e., are there other U8P_STMEGG::hatch triggers)?

main_function.name: U8P_STMEGG::hatch
main_function.purpose: Coordinate a visual/audio hatching sequence and spawn child actors for each matching nearby map/list entry, then run cleanup and remove the egg item.
entry_conditions: Event 7 (fast-area / area-trigger style): appears to run when the avatar or some actor triggers the egg's U8P_STMEGG::hatch region or when the egg is commanded to U8P_STMEGG::hatch.

function_map.name: U8P_STMEGG::hatch
function_map.role: Orchestrates the U8P_STMEGG::hatch sequence (effects, scanning, spawning, cleanup, destroying the egg).

function_map.name: U8P_STMITE::00AE
function_map.role: Per-match spawn helper; likely creates a hatchling/minion associated with a matched map entry.

function_map.name: U8P_FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Post-spawn cleanup/follow-up helper; likely handles delayed effects or resource release after spawning.

function_map.name: Item::getQ
function_map.role: Query a map/list entry for its identifying quantity/id used for matching.

function_map.name: Item::getMapArray
function_map.role: Retrieve an egg-associated map-array value whose low bits are used to determine spawn matches.

function_map.name: Camera::startQuake
function_map.role: Start camera shake effect to emphasize hatching.

function_map.name: Camera::stopQuake
function_map.role: Stop camera shake effect started at U8P_STMEGG::hatch begin.

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Remove/destroy the egg item at the end of the sequence.

function_map.name: spawn
function_map.role: Engine spawn mechanism used to start helper scripts (STMITE::00AE and FREE::1C19).

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn a per-match helper to create an individual hatchling/minion using the matched map entry and pid.
Spawn a single follow-up/cleanup helper after the per-match spawning phase (args: pid, 0x0096, 0).

external_calls.purpose: Begin a camera shake effect to highlight the U8P_STMEGG::hatch event (called with intensity 4).
Play the U8P_STMEGG::hatch sound effect (sound id 0x31) at the sequence start.
Get a map-array value from the egg item; the script masks its low 5 bits for matching logic.
Read identifier/quantity from each scanned map/list entry to compare against the masked egg value.
Start helper scripts (per-match STMITE::00AE and single FREE::1C19) to create hatchlings and run cleanup.
Stop the camera shake effect after spawning and cleanup are complete.
Destroy/remove the egg item once the hatching sequence completes.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Implements an egg-hatching sequence for an item passed as the function parameter. The sequence starts a camera quake and plays a U8P_STMEGG::hatch sound, scans a nearby map/item array for entries matching a masked value derived from the egg, spawns a helper script for each match (creating hatchlings), runs a single follow-up/cleanup helper, stops the camera quake, and destroys the egg item.
